label: Launch
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: Orion and ESA's Lunar View launch together on SLS toward lunar orbit.

label: Translunar transfer
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: The co-manifested stack departs Earth for the Moon.

label: Gateway approach
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: Orion arrives in the Gateway staging orbit family near the Moon. NASA has not publicly released the exact operational ephemeris.

label: Deliver Lunar View
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: Orion delivers Lunar View to Gateway, where it docks to HALO.

label: Lander docks to Gateway
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: A Human Landing System docks to Gateway to receive the surface crew.

label: Crew transfer and descent
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: Two astronauts transfer to the lander and descend toward the lunar South Pole region.

label: Surface mission
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: About a week of surface exploration near the South Pole, with Artemis V also expected to begin the first Moon-base buildup and the first crewed use of the Lunar Terrain Vehicle.

label: Ascent and redock
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: The surface crew returns to Gateway and transfers back to Orion.

label: Return to Earth
sourceNote: Current official Artemis V phase flow from NASA 2026 mission framing; timing remains notional until exact ephemeris is released.
description: The full crew departs lunar orbit and returns to Earth on Orion.
